caption_guidance: Hook: excitement or main benefit of the event. Body: compact lines with date, time, location, and key rules. CTA: urgency — save, comment, or RSVP aligned with brand voice.
visual_guidance: Always Path C with Pillow text overlay. Bold focal area, energetic mood, high contrast. 1-3 short uppercase labels (event name, date, location). Max 2 font weights. Leave safe zone center for readability on mobile.
path_rules: Always Path C for reliable date/time/place overlays. text_overlay.enabled must be true. Do not use Path A or B for event posts.

composition.safe_zone: Headline top-left or top-center; details bottom-center; avoid edge cropping.

prompt_snippets.path_c: Event promo template: bold background using brand accent color, clear area for event title and date/time overlay, energetic campaign mood, high contrast, no long paragraphs on image.
